description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 27 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 19 mins. His activity was split across Other (40%), Java (40%), and Markdown (16%). The JSON shows 6 projects in WakaTime, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
